svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="JY-1xWXuEYKjOuxmr4kB"> <mxGraphModel dx="1269" dy="658" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="Producto (Context)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="250" x="120" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- state: StockState
- stock: int
- stock_minimo: int" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="120" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ change_state(state)
+ vender(cantidad)
+ reponer(cantidad)
+ get_estado_actual()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="250" x="120" y="295" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#333333;" value="<<interface>>
StockState" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="730" y="215" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ vender(producto, cantidad)
+ reponer(producto, cantidad)
+ get_label(): str" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="220" x="730" y="265" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="StockNormalState" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="200" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- context: Producto" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="220" x="200" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ vender(): descuenta stock
 → transicion a StockBajo
+ reponer(): suma stock
+ get_label(): 'Normal'" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="200" y="565" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="StockBajoState" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="460" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- context: Producto" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="220" x="460" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ vender(): descuenta stock
 → transicion a SinStock
+ reponer(): suma stock
 → transicion a Normal
+ get_label(): 'Stock Bajo'" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="460" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="SinStockState" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="860" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- context: Producto" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="220" x="860" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ vender(): rechaza venta
 (stock insuficiente)
+ reponer(): suma stock
 → transicion a StockBajo
+ get_label(): 'Sin Stock'" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="860" y="565" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=15;" value="Client (ventas/views.py
compras/views.py)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="120" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="add_venta() → producto.vender()
add_compra() → producto.reponer()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="250" x="120" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="16" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=ERmanyToOne;endFill=0;startArrow=ERmandOne;startFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;" target="5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;endFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="840" y="330" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;endFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="760" y="340" /> <mxPoint x="760" y="350" /> <mxPoint x="840" y="350" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="840" y="320" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="13" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;endFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="840" y="320" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="16" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="80" y="58" /> <mxPoint x="80" y="410" /> <mxPoint x="310" y="410" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="16" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="10"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="16" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="13"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 190px; margin-left: 48px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

- stock: int
